rationale: Educ. Code §29.041 defines terms for special education supplemental services. It has no fiscal, definitional, or operational connection to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption increase.
quote: "Supplemental services" means an additive service that provides an educational benefit to a student receiving special education services under Subchapter A
_note: No conflict; this section is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
